name: Community Healthcare
description_short: This is not a consumer finance company. The website is a RAND Health Quarterly research article about VA community care for veterans, not a financial services provider.
description_long: CRITICAL FINDING: This profile cannot be completed as requested. The provided URL (https://www.rand.org/pubs/periodicals/health-quarterly/issues/v10/n3/09.html) does not belong to a company called 'Community Healthcare' offering financial services. The URL is a peer-reviewed research article published by RAND Corporation in their Health Quarterly journal (September 2023), authored by Petra W. Rasmussen and Carrie M. Farmer. The article examines VA (Veterans Health Administration) community care delivery, eligibility criteria, and policy challenges—it is academic health policy research, not a consumer finance product or service. The content discusses how the VA supplements healthcare delivery through private-sector community providers, but this is a government health system analysis, not a commercial financial services offering. There is no pricing information, no APR, no loan products, no credit services, and no consumer finance offerings described anywhere in this content. The article is focused on veteran healthcare access, wait times, and cost-effectiveness of VA community care delivery models.
